source_pr.title: *: add warnings to slow log and slow query table
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: ref #39893

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: "order by time desc limit 1").Rows(), (executor/slow_query_sql_test.go).

evidence: files: executor/adapter.go, executor/main_test.go, executor/slow_query.go, executor/slow_query_sql_test.go, executor/slow_query_test.go, executor/testdata/slow_query_suite_in.json, executor/testdata/slow_query_suite_out.json, expression/expression.go, infoschema/tables.go, infoschema/tables_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/stats.go, planner/core/task.go, planner/core/testdata/integration_suite_out.json, planner/optimize.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go
